{{Location|title=Cathay|imagecaption=Map of Cathay|type=|image=File:CathayFullMap.png}}

==Cathay==
Golden days of heroes flow away like rivers, while the hills silently watch the sun rise and fall.

Welcome to Cathay! Rose Garden, Emerald Villa, Starry Mansion, and Central Plaza are all great tourist attractions! If you would like to purchase a house, be sure to contact Mr. Zhang: 188xxxx345. The first three customers who call in each day will enjoy a $20 discount!

Cathay is the 3rd of 8 [[Realms]].
{{realm table}}

==INTEL==
See [[Cathay INTEL]] for INTEL tables.

==Apostles ==
See [[Cathay Apostles]] for each Apostles' stats.

==Card Conversions==
See [[Cathay Cards]] for a list of all limited cards in Cathay and what they can be redeemed for.

==Key Clue Records==
See [[Cathay Key Clues]] for a list of all Key Clues in Cathay, how to complete them, and what they reward.

==Cathay Generals==
See [[Cathay Generals]] to see more about where to obtain generals, stats, formations, and more.

==Realm Trait - Supreme Warlord==
See [[Supreme Warlord]] for information on cost, stats, and unsealing. 

[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Cathay]]
